  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Et feptitâ Gaddâ ſtip- 
Brinajahs Jojadus/ un 
peezehme tohs Kaptei-
es/ Asartju Jeroama Dehlu/ 
n Jsinaëſu Joanana Dehlu/ 
n Asartju Obeda Dehlu/ un 
naefeju Adaja Dehlu/ un Eli-
wata Sifra Dehlu/ tahdâ Der-
bâ pee ſewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee gabje eekſch Juha 
pkahrt/ un ſapulzinaja tohs Ke-
itus no wiſſeem Juha Pils-
hteem/ un Israêta Wirfuee-
us to Tehwo Nammu/ un tee 
ahze uhs Jerufalemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad darrija wiſſa Drau-
iba weenu Derribu Deewa 
ainina ar to Kehnizu/ un 
insch fazziſa us teem: Rangi/
a Kehniza Dehſam buhs par 
ehnizu buht/ ittin ka tas 
UNGS no Dahwida Deh-
em irr runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schi irr ta Leeta/ kas 
wis jadarra/ weena trescha 
eeſa no jums/ kam Swehdee-
à Kahrtâ jastahw no teem Pree-
exeem un Lewiteem/ lai pee ta 
Sleegſka Wakti turr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weena trescha Teefa lai 
ahro pee ta Kehniza Namma/ 
n weena trescha Teefa pee tahm 
Bruntes Wahrtim. Un wiſſi 
andts lai ta KUNGA Namma 
agalmâ stahw.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ne weenam buhs ta 
UNGA Nammâ nahkt/ ka
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Lewitti lai wiſſap-
kahrt to Kehnizu stahjahs/ ik-
katrs ar fawu Eerohtſi fawa 
Rohkâ/ un kas Nammâ nahk/ 
tam buhs nomirt/ bet jums buhs 
pee ta Kehniza buht/ kad tas ee-
eet un iſeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Lewitti un wiſſa 
Juha darrija pehz wiſſu/ ko 
Jojadus tas Preesteris bij pa-
wehlejs/ un ikkatrs nehnie fawus 
Wihrus/ kam Swehdeenâ Kahrt-
tâ bij jastahw/ ar tein/ kas 
Swehdeenâ no Kahrtas atstah-
jahs. Jo tas Preesteris Joja-
dus ne dewe teem Kahrtneckeim 
Waktu no-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Preesteris Jojadus 
dewe teem Kapteinehm Schkeh-
pus un preekſchturamas Bruk-
nas/ un tahs Beunnas/ kas 
tam Kehnizam Dahwidam bt-
ischas/ kas Deewa Nammâ bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch wedde wiſſu 
Landis ikkatru ar fawu Eerohtſi 
fawa Rohkâ/ no ta Namma lab-
bas Puﬀes lihdſta Nammakrei-
sai Puﬀei/lihdſtam Altarain un 
tam Nammam pee ta Kehniza 
wifsapkahrtr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee iſwedde ta Kehni-
na Dehlu/ un uſlikke wiſſam 
to Krohni/ un dewe tam to Lee-
zibas Grabmatu/ un darrija to 
par Kehnizu. Un Jojadus ar 
faweem Dehleem ſwandija to/
Rrrrr z un
"
